title: Housing Benefit subsidy initial pre-audit final claims: Apr 2024 to Mar 2025
body: "The data tables show the local authority Housing Benefit (HB) subsidy initial pre-audit final claims for expenditure and subsidy of HB for England, Scotland and Wales.  These figures are the actual HB payments for the financial year 2024 to 2025 and, subject to audit certification, form the basis for the subsidy settlement for that year.  The guidance notes and forms have been added to explain the cell data given in the data table.  "
